violations.text: The Island Oasis and Cappuccino machines were observed draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

No person in charge certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. PIC to ensure that a person certified in food safety is present at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time individual certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection as required when hot holding food items. Person certified in food safety is to be registered with RIDOH CFP as soon as possible. Certified Food Safety Manager License printed and left with the PIC at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

Hash Browns were observed held out of hot holding equipment at 105 degrees Fahrenheit. Per the employee, for quality, Hash Brown Potatoes were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026
The Island Oasis and Cappuccino machines were observed draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026
